title: Interpreting type 1 diabetes risk with genetics and single-cell epigenomics.
author: Chiou J Geusz RJ Okino ML Han JY Miller M Melton R Beebe E Benaglio P Huang S Korgaonkar K Heller S Kleger A Preissl S Gorkin DU Sander M Gaulton KJ
content: S-EPMC10560508 PMC10560508 Interpreting type 1 diabetes risk with genetics and single-cell epigenomics. Genetic risk variants that have been identified in genome-wide association studies of complex diseases are primarily non-coding<sup>1</sup>. Translating these risk variants into mechanistic
